title: ParameterSchedule
content:
# ParameterSchedule


## Properties

- **app_name** (`string`): Application key `name` to associate with Assets (resources) to perform the required actions.
- **app_version** (`string`): Version of Application.
- **scheduled_for** (`string`): UTC date and time when the new parameters are to be applied, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **resources** (`array`): List of assets for which the parameters to be updated at the scheduled time. (example `krn:asset:bp_16`)
- **parameters** (`object`): List of parameter names and their associated values.
- **comment** (`string`): Additional comments associated with the scheduled parameter change
- **revert** (`object`): Revert parameters configuration at a schedule time after the initial parameter change is implemented.
- **id** (`string`): Unique ID of this parameter schedule
- **state** (`string`): 
- **original_resource_parameters** (`array`): 
- **error_msg** (`string`): Error message if the schedule fails to be implemented.
- **created_at** (`string`): UTC date and time when the parameter schedule is first created, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **created_by** (`string`): The user or process that initiated the creation of this parameter scheduled.
- **applied_at** (`string`): UTC date and time when the new parameters are actually applied, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **applied_by** (`string`): The user or process that initiated the apply parameters command of this parameter scheduled.
- **reverted_at** (`string`): UTC date and time when the new revert parameters are actually applied, formatted in RFC 3339.
- **reverted_by** (`string`): The user or process that initiated the revert parameters command of this parameter scheduled.
summary: Object with properties: app_name, app_version, scheduled_for, resources, parameters

app_name.description: Application key `name` to associate with Assets (resources) to perform the required actions.

scheduled_for.description: UTC date and time when the new parameters are to be applied, formatted in RFC 3339.

resources.description: List of assets for which the parameters to be updated at the scheduled time. (example `krn:asset:bp_16`)

parameters.description: List of parameter names and their associated values.

comment.description: Additional comments associated with the scheduled parameter change

revert.description: Revert parameters configuration at a schedule time after the initial parameter change is implemented.

scheduled_for.description: UTC date and time when the original or alternative parameters are to be applied, formatted in RFC 3339. This must be a time after the original change schedule in the key `scheduled_for` in the root of this json data package.

resource.description: The target Asset to which the parameters are to be applied.

parameters.description: List of parameter names and their associated values.

id.description: Unique ID of this parameter schedule

parameters.description: List of parameter names and their associated values.

error_msg.description: Error message if the schedule fails to be implemented.

created_at.description: UTC date and time when the parameter schedule is first created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The user or process that initiated the creation of this parameter scheduled.

applied_at.description: UTC date and time when the new parameters are actually applied, formatted in RFC 3339.

applied_by.description: The user or process that initiated the apply parameters command of this parameter scheduled.

reverted_at.description: UTC date and time when the new revert parameters are actually applied, formatted in RFC 3339.

reverted_by.description: The user or process that initiated the revert parameters command of this parameter scheduled.
